languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

languages.text: "Весьма блеклый взгляд на существование. Изволите конкретизировать его, чтобы я понял вашу точку зрения лучше?"
"A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

languages.text: «Una opinión bastante desalentadora de la existencia. ¿Podría desarrollarla, para que entienda mejor su punto de vista?».
languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

traits.locale_text: «Una opinión bastante desalentadora de la existencia. ¿Podría desarrollarla, para que entienda mejor su punto de vista?».

languages.text: “这种存在观未免太灰暗了。您愿意详细阐述一下吗？以便我更好地理解您的观点。”
languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

traits.locale_text: “这种存在观未免太灰暗了。您愿意详细阐述一下吗？以便我更好地理解您的观点。”

languages.text: « Une vision bien triste de l'existence. Pourriez-vous développer votre propos, que je puisse mieux comprendre votre point de vue ? »
languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

traits.locale_text: « Une vision bien triste de l'existence. Pourriez-vous développer votre propos, que je puisse mieux comprendre votre point de vue ? »

languages.text: "Ein recht trostloses Verständnis von Existenz. Würdet Ihr das bitte ausführen, damit ich Euren Standpunkt besser verstehe?"
languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

traits.locale_text: "Ein recht trostloses Verständnis von Existenz. Würdet Ihr das bitte ausführen, damit ich Euren Standpunkt besser verstehe?"

languages.text: "かなり殺伐とした存在観ですね。あなたの見解をよりよく理解するために、もう少し詳しく説明していただけませんか？"
languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"

languages.text: "Varoluşa dair oldukça kasvetli bir görüş. Bakış açınızı daha iyi anlayabilmem için bunu biraz daha açar mısınız?"
languages.original_text: "A rather bleak view of existence. Would you care to elaborate on that, so that I might better understand your point of view?"
